title: Monday API - Updating Column Descriptions
excerpt: Hi - Can I update column description via Monday.com API? Trying to build dynamic forms and the only issue I’m having is I am not able to find documentation on updating column description via API.

posts.author: THDMonday.com (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - Can I update column description via Monday.com API? Trying to build dynamic forms and the only issue I’m having is I am not able to find documentation on updating column description via API.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there, @THDMonday.com

That’s a great questioon! At this time, it is not possible to update the column description, or create a column with descriptions.

Could you please provide further detail into your current workflow? I’m curious to learn as to how column descriptions via the API would be useful, in your use case.

I’m looking forward to hearing from you soon!

-Alex

posts.author: THDMonday.com (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Alex, i realized I might be asking this wrong. We like using Monday.com forms and want to be able to programmatically create them using the Monday API…one thing it looks like we cannot do is update the “description” field of the form via the API.

image829×597 20.2 KB

Thanks for the help!

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@THDMonday.com

Ah, got it. I’m afraid that isn’t an option either, at this time, and it is highly unlikely to be implemented anytime soon Thank you for bringing this to our attention, though!

-Alex
